code: import{invoke}from"@forge/bridge";export const getPortfolio=id=>{return invoke("getPortfolio",{id:id});};export const portfolioApi=()=>{return{getAll:async()=>{return invoke('getPortfolios');},get:id=>{return invoke("getPortfolio",{id});},create:portfolio=>{return invoke("createPortfolio",{portfolio});},update:(id,portfolio)=>{return invoke("updatePortfolio",{id,portfolio});},delete:id=>{return invoke("deletePortfolio",{id});},connect:(selfPortfolioId,connectPortfolioId)=>{return invoke("connectPortfolioToPortfolio",{selfPortfolioId,connectPortfolioId});},disconnect:portfolioId=>{return invoke("disconnectPortfolioFromPortfolio",{portfolioId});}};};
